title: Ephyrium Shaders
description: Experience unique effects and realistic visuals with Ephyrium Shaders
body:
Ephyrium Shaders is somewhat stylized and realistic shaders! Explore realistic and stunning effects and visuals, some of them is first ever with this shaders!

There is WARNING that this is my first shaders so it can be retty laggy and has some bugs

Known bugs: some artifacts with shadows, some bugs with water and also not the best performance! Recommended to have atleast RTX3060 + i3 12100 + 16 GB RAM or better to play with good FPS!

SHADERS HAVE:
- Pretty lighting with stunning sunsets
- Shadows
- Volumetric fog that moves and localized
- Volumetric clouds that with a whole 3 layers
- Stylized water with caustics
- Water fog
- Rain shafts(rain fog)
- Not bad configurability

WARNING: for now Distant Horizons or Voxy is NOT working with these shaders.

sorry for that not much screenshots of the shaders. it will be fixed soon.
